CustomField.description: When checked, the trigger dispatcher calls the data masking framework on every before-insert and before-update for this object before any configured TriggerAction handlers run. Only fires when the MaskingFramework_Enabled feature flag is on. Defaults to true so objects with a TriggerSetting are masked automatically; uncheck to opt this one object out.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Auto-masks configured fields on this object before insert and update. Uncheck only if this object has no sensitive data and you want to skip the masking pass for performance reasons.
CustomField.label: Apply Masking
